decision_summary: Archmap impact for TASK-071 is approved as a bounded v6.6 release claim.
rationale: The release defines architecture impact governance, commits an Archmap source, records work-item impact, keeps Mission Control as a projection, and does not overclaim renderer integration or diagram quality.
recommendation: Release v6.6.0 after release-state, task closure, and verification gates pass.
target_audience: AOF release operator deciding whether v6.6 Archmap-aware Mission Control can ship.
expected_user_reaction: The operator should understand that v6.6 ships governed architecture-impact traceability, not full visual architecture comprehension.
artifact_change_recommendations: Keep Mission Control projection tied to canonical Archmap and AOF artifact refs.
organization_change_recommendations: Require architecture impact disposition for implementation-grade work before release sign-off.
